nasb.text: At the sound of the horseman and bowman every city flees; They go into the thickets and climb among the rocks; Every city is forsaken, And no man dwells in them.

esv.text: At the noise of horseman and archer every city takes to flight; they enter thickets; they climb among rocks; all the cities are forsaken, and no man dwells in them.

cnv.text: 因著騎兵和弓箭手的響聲， 各城的人盡都逃跑。 他們進入密林，爬上巖穴； 各城都被撇下， 無人住在其中。

ccb.text: 各城的人听到骑兵和弓箭手的呐喊， 都纷纷逃命。 有的跑入丛林，有的爬进岩洞。 各城荒弃，无人居住。
